name: Woven Storage Boxes Set of 2 Taupe - Threshold™: Desk & Office Organizers, , Recycled Materials
description:
Keep clutter in check with this Set of 2 Woven Storage Boxes Threshold™. Made from paper and cardboard, these storage boxes bring clutter-free organization to your desk. The set includes two rectangular storage boxes with lids that come in handy for organizing small everyday essentials, office supplies or stationery. Showcasing a woven design in a taupe hue with a brown faux-leather accent on the front, they'll also bring sleek style to your workstation or any table.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Dimensions:
Large box - 12.75 inches (L) x 9.25 inches (W) x 4.25 inches (H)
Medium box - 10.5 inches (L) x 6.5 inches (W) x 3.75 inches (H)
